playbook.intent: Disconnected OKRs → cascaded company → team → personal OKRs with weekly check-ins and a quarterly blameless retro.
playbook.scope: Company OKR cascades to team OKR cascades to personal OKR. Weekly check-ins happen in 1:1s. A mid-quarter pivot gate decides whether to carry OKRs forward or rewrite. End-of-quarter blameless retro closes the loop. Output: every dev knows what their work ladders to, and the team has explicit carry-over rules.

success-criteria.criterion: Personal OKRs cascaded for every dev
Carry-over rules applied at quarter close

stage.name: Cascade to personal
stage.intent: Team OKRs → personal OKRs in every 1:1.

tasks.task: Manager + direct agree on 1-3 personal OKRs that ladder to team OKRs
Confirm each KR is measurable + has a numeric target

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each dev has 1-3 personal OKRs traceable to team OKRs.

stage.name: Weekly check-in cadence
stage.intent: OKR progress reviewed weekly in 1:1; status doesn't drift.

tasks.task: Weekly status update per OKR (green / yellow / red)

stage.decision-gate: Skip the check-in once = drift. Two skips = the cadence is dead.

stage.name: Mid-quarter pivot gate
stage.intent: At ~6 weeks: keep / revise / kill each OKR.

tasks.task: Decide: keep / revise / kill per OKR

stage.decision-gate: Required: written keep/revise/kill verdict per OKR. Inertia = death of OKRs.

stage.name: Quarter close: retro + carry-over

tasks.task: Apply carry-over rules (what carries, what dies)

stage.decision-gate: Required: retro published before next-quarter OKRs land. Otherwise the next quarter repeats the same misses.

extra.value: [Setting the OKRs themselves — see quarter-planning-okr-reset, Performance reviews — out of scope, Daily/weekly delivery cadences — see daily-standup-ai-prebrief and backlog-grooming-pm-tech-lead]
[Company OKRs published, Team OKRs in place (from quarter-planning-okr-reset), '1:1 cadence wired between manager and each direct']

[Personal OKRs don't ladder to team OKRs — confusion + drift, Weekly check-ins skipped 'just this week' — cadence dies fast, No mid-quarter pivot gate — bad OKRs run to quarter end, Carry-over rules implicit — last-minute disputes at quarter close]
['Can every dev name their personal OKRs and their lift to team OKRs?', 'Did we hold a mid-quarter pivot decision in writing?', 'Did the blameless retro happen before the next-quarter OKRs?']

{human: faion get-content quarterly-okr-cascade-weekly-review --format md, agent: faion get-content quarterly-okr-cascade-weekly-review --format context, json: faion get-content quarterly-okr-cascade-weekly-review --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P6 product-dev team persona}]
